feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Private Cloud - F2548 – row template in Upload General Journal Entries
entry.content:
Dear All,

When the new template (in row) in app F2548 will be available for Private and on-Premise solution ?

This template has been available in Public cloud since version 2308.

Thank you

Best regards

Julien

entry.title: Error while exposing CDS view to SAC
entry.content:
Hello Community,

From online blogs, I understood below are the steps to expose a CDS view to cloud SAC.

Create a CDS composite view with cube data category.

Create a CDS consumption view with @Analytics.query: true and @OData.publish: true and make API State as released

Below are the steps I followed:

1) Created a custom table

2) Created composite view with below annotations based on above table

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZKAMDCCP'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Test CDS View'

@Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled: true

@VDM.viewType: #COMPOSITE

@Analytics: { dataCategory: #CUBE}

3) Created consumption view with below annotations

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZKAMDCNS'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Test CDS View- Consumption'

@OData.publish: true

@Analytics.dataExtraction.enabled: true

@VDM.viewType: #CONSUMPTION

@Analytics.query: true

4) Enabled API for consumption view

5) When I try to register this view in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE, getting below error

Query ZKAMDCNS could not be opened.

If I remove "@Analytics.query: true" from consumption view, able to register the view in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and able to see data in SAP Gateway client.

What am I missing here ? Please advise.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Service Contract- Inhouse Preventive Work
entry.content:
Hi All, Our company sign AMC for preventive and repair work - Onsite and Inhouse. Company asks to send Equipment to Inhouse Workshop for Preventive work. Here Customer Equipment is held for 1 week.

We are following SM01 Order type way. I want to ask is there a way we can do return and outbound delivery to show that customer equipment is inhouse. Just in case for extra work which are not covered in Contract are included in Service Order. How to create Quotation from SM01 Order type.

In case if we follow SM03 Order type way in which we can do return and outbound deliversy how to settle costs to contract and take Contract Price agreement while doing Resource related billing.

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Functionality Replacement for Transaction KSS4 and KSPI in S4HANA Private Edition
entry.content: I am writing to inquire about the functionality that replaces the transaction codes KSS4 and KSPI in the S4HANA Private Edition. Specifically, I am interested in understanding how the system now calculates and splits activity type cost rates.

entry.title: No Output table is mapped in the query operation - SEGW
entry.content:
Hi everyone
Happy to see you all currently i am working on odata services for the cretation of notification from the Bapis and using the Odata services create the entity sets and send the data to another system using Gateway link i have completd the creation of services and now i am doing the data mappings here get entity (Read) is completed with worning but 7in Query i am getting the issue so any one can help me on this.

entry.title: Can Point-to-Point Time replication from SuccessFactors to S/4HANA Private Cloud be used?
entry.content:
As per the title.

Can this content be used to replicate time data from SuccessFactors to S/4HANA Private Cloud?

The documentation seems to refer to EC Payroll often but this is not what we want to replicate to!

Can you help clarify this?

Kind regards,

David

entry.title: Release cycle and forced version up of S/4HANA Cloud, private edition
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

This is about the frequency of version updates (innovation cycle) of S/4HANA Cloud, private edition.

How often will forced version updates be performed for S/4HANA Cloud, private edition?

"Forced" means that the user cannot choose the update timing by user, and SAP performs the version up.

I think the user interface may change.

We understand that from October 2023, the release cycle for private editions will be extended from 1 year to 2 years, and the mainstream maintenance period will be extended from 5 years to 7 years.

I would like to know whether it is necessary to forcefully update the version once every two years.

As a background, when proposing S/4HANA Cloud solution to customers, I would like to explain the difference between private and public, and also explain the frequency of forced version updates.

Thank you for your support.
Haruki SATO

entry.title: Service Contract organization inconsistency S4HANA Service
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have the following problem:

I want to create service order with item assigned to service contract. The contract doesn't have service organization.

I am getting the following error: Item 100: Orgl. data is inconsistent between order item 0000000100 and service contract.

I dont want to have a SO on service contract - it is a warranty contract, so no matter which SO is processing the service, the client is entitled to contract agreements.

I want to have a SO on service order - I want to indicace who is providing services upfront.

How can I solve this?

entry.title: Can you share a help documentation on How to install fiori app library ? (Communication Management)
entry.content: I want to access the SAP S/4 HANA Cloud APIs using Post Man. Need help documentation on how to install fiori app library for Communication Management. 2224713-screenshot-2023-10-31-at-43308-pm.png

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Private edition IP Subnet /24 for customer
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I would like to know why we need /24 Subnet from customer for Private cloud onboarding ?


What will be the approach if the customer is not having dedicated network team.

Regards,

Vignesh

entry.title: Advanced Payment Management 4MT - Automatic payment by percentage
entry.content:
Dear All,

May somebody explain me how to use the scope item 4MT to distribute supplier payments between several banks as a percentage rather than an amount ?

Thanks a lot

BR

Julien

entry.title: What points need to be taken into account when switching from S4HANA to RISE mode?
entry.content:
The RISE model seems extremely advantageous when we look at certain blogs.

But how does it really work?

Dear experts, could I have some information on this subject, or some instructive blogs?

Best regards,

Patrick

entry.title: WBS Billing Plan overrides Sales Order Billing Plan in revenue planning
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are using S4H private cloud. Our scenario call for creation of:

1) project/WBS with milestones

2) WBS billing plan

3) Sales Order and assignment to billing WBS

4) Sales Order billing plan via copy of WBS milestones

5) Load (CJR2) of project/WBS cost plan (Revenue portion of the plan is SD Order integrated)

6) Execution of Results Analysis for POC revenue recognition (method 3)

Problem:

If we load WBS billing plan, we see revenue plan values = WBS billing plan values

If we load SO billing plan after we load WBS billing plan, we see revenue plan values = WBS billing plan values (not sales order billing plan)

If we delete WBS billing plan, we see revenue plan values = Sales Order Billing plan values.

The behavior is unclear. Could you please clarify what billing plan takes precedence for proposes of revenue planning.

As WBS billing plan is a preliminary function, it would make sense for it to be discarded in revenue planning when Sales Order billing plan is established for the same. The opposite seems to be true.

Please note that same Cost Element is used in both.

The SAP help states that both would be added together. This does not seem to be taking place either.

Thanks,

Alex

entry.title: SAP CRM/CM: Editable Sales Organisation, Distribution at Opportunity OV page
entry.content:
Hi Frds,

As soon we filled Sales Organisation(S.Org, Distribution, Division) information at Opportunity OV page the fields get disable. How can i make it editable so that user can modify if he select incorrect Sales Organisation Info.

I suspect, Some Configuration setting need to be made to make it changeable.

Kindly Suggest.

Thanks

RI.

entry.title: Content Server and Rise with SAP, private edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to ask about document management system in Rise with SAP, private edition.

Can we still use content server as DMS along with private cloud? Is there extra license if the customer purchased Rise with SAP, private cloud? I beleive Integration Suite will be neccessary to make integration between Rise and Content Server, can you confirm?

If we cant use content server as DMS what are the alternative options with considering minimum scope and budget? I thought DMS in PLM or DMS in BTP would not be suitable for small size customers.

I really appriciate upcoming feedbacks.

entry.title: New Company Code configuration in existing system with some modules FICO, MM, SD
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client has approx 4 company codes and all are working fine. Now the client has acquired a new business and wants to create a new company code in SAP R/3. The client has said that I have to copy only some modules of i.e. FICO, MM and SD. Now here starts my queries related to this new requirement:

1. Is there any short way to create the new company code with all the functionalities of a target company code or I have to go to each and every steps and do the customization for new company code.

2. New Company code have no production and operated in UAE, while the existing company codes have production plants.

3. New company code will receive Finished goods from all existing company codes through Inter-company selling.

4. Regarding master data, how to copy the material master, vendor, customer GL etc to the new company code from the target company code.

5.What are the precautions which I should take care of during the new company code setup.

6. Your advise as how to go ahead for this.

 

Thanks & Regards,
Farhan Rasheed

entry.title: How to set default user parameter for sap s/4hana private edit via SAP IPS
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are using SAP ips to provision user from azure AD to our SAP s/4hana private edition.

One of our business processes required default user parameters (as maintained on su3/su01).

We tried to find any documentation how to set it on the transformation but not find anything.

Does anyone maybe know how to do it?

Thank in advance.

SAP Cloud Identity Services 

SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud

entry.title: Monitor Material Coverage - Days' Supply
entry.content:
Hi,

Our customer has a raw material component with a projected shortage. When looking at the Days Supply from Monitor Material Coverage view, it is listed as 9999 days.

However, when opening material in Manage Material Coverage, Days' Supply is now 0. 

 

Would anyone be able to suggest why there would be a discrepancy between these two fields, as it is causing confusing for the end-users?

entry.title: Call SFTP from S/4 - HEC system (infrastructure options)
entry.content:
Hi, 

  We have a S/4 system hosted on sap HEC under RISE model. We need to use a integration with customer SFTP server onpremise, but we have no CPI. We are trying to find options for this integration.  

I can only think in creating a shell script that user sftp os command to send/receive files from sftp server, and call this script from an sm49 external command. 

Have someone found an scenario like this ? Is there another option to call a SFTP server from ABAP ? I think it could be dificult to test withou access to OS.

best regards

entry.title: S4 and SAC Connectivity : Do we need to open the HTTP flow between S4Hana and SAC ?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

In our endeavor to establish a live data connection between our S4Hana environment and SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud), we are in the preparatory phase and have a couple of inquiries:

  1. Do we need to initiate service requests to facilitate communication flow between S4Hana and SAC (HTTP)?

  2. Is SSL configuration required at the S4Hana level?

I appreciate your ideas and assistance greatly


Thank you
